mapper.sql:
select sso.street_name as street_office_name, svc.village_name as village_committee_name, sp.name, sp.id_card_no, sp.birthday, date_format(date_add(sp.birthday, interval 60 year), '%Y-%m') as retirement_month, sp.subsidy_status, concat_ws('、', if(ll.subsidy_person_id is not null, '失地补贴', null), if(dr.subsidy_person_id is not null, '拆迁补贴', null), if(vo.subsidy_person_id is not null, '村干部补贴', null)) as subsidy_type from shebao_subsidy_person sp left join shebao_street_office sso on sp.street_office_id = sso.id left join shebao_village_committee svc on sp.village_committee_id = svc.id left join ( select distinct subsidy_person_id from shebao_land_loss_resident where del_flag = '0' ) ll on ll.subsidy_person_id = sp.id left join ( select distinct subsidy_person_id from shebao_demolition_resident where del_flag = '0' ) dr on dr.subsidy_person_id = sp.id left join ( select distinct subsidy_person_id from shebao_village_official where del_flag = '0' ) vo on vo.subsidy_person_id = sp.id
sp.del_flag = '0' and sp.birthday is not null and (ll.subsidy_person_id is not null or dr.subsidy_person_id is not null or vo.subsidy_person_id is not null)
and date_format(date_add(sp.birthday, interval 60 year), '%Y-%m') <= #{req.noticeMonth} and sp.subsidy_status = '0' and sp.person_status = '0'
and sp.id_card_no = #{req.idCardNo}
mapper.select: order by retirement_month asc, sp.id asc

select t.street_office_name, t.village_committee_name, t.name, t.id_card_no, date_format(t.birthday, '%Y-%m-%d') as birthday, t.retirement_month, case t.subsidy_status when '0' then '正常' when '1' then '终止' else t.subsidy_status end as subsidy_status, t.subsidy_type from (
) t order by t.retirement_month asc, t.id_card_no asc
